reviews.comment:
La atención de todos los playeros es excelente, lo único que un poco lerdo ya que atiende uno y es el mismo que cobra, carga, etc. Siempre conseguimos combustible, no tuvimos problema. Fuimos en Octubre 2023 el fin de semana largo.

(Translated by Google)
The service from all the gas station attendants is excellent; the only downside is that it's a bit slow since one person handles everything, including payment, fueling, etc. We always found fuel; we had no problems. We went in October 2023 during the long weekend.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1MGZxR3ZRRRAB

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the convenience store staff and gas station attendants. Reasonable prices, clean and tidy place. Highly recommended.
